steps.title: Perform the lysis according to the NucleoMag® Virus user manual
steps.instruction: Perform the lysis according to the NucleoMag® Virus user manual.

steps.title: Fill the 12-Well Buffer Reservoir according to the table below
steps.instruction: Fill the 12-Well Buffer Reservoir according to the table below.

steps.title: Resuspend the NucleoMag® V-Beads by vortexing...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the NucleoMag® V-Beads by vortexing and place them in Position A1 of the 2mL Tube Rack.

steps.title: Load the instrument deck according to the displayed positions
steps.instruction: Load the instrument deck according to the displayed positions.

steps.title: Place the Square-well Block containing the...
steps.instruction: Place the Square-well Block containing the lysates on the Magnetic Module and start the run. You can access the full description of this workflow on the OT-2 by visiting this link: [link](https://opentrons-protocol-library-website.s3.amazonaws.com/custom-README-images/macherey-nagel-nucleomag-virus/thepdf.pdf)

steps.title: Download your protocol and unzip if needed
steps.instruction: Download your protocol and unzip if needed.

steps.title: Upload your custom labware to the...
steps.instruction: Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.

steps.title: Upload your protocol file (
steps.instruction: Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
